title: Recursive Existential Stack Kernel
canonical_statement: Existence persists where participation remains recursively traversable through coherent continuity propagation.

formal_statement.statement: Existence persists where participatory continuity remains recursively traversable through coherent continuity-wave propagation across recoverable future-fiber topology under recursive constraint.
formal_statement.emergence_statement: Existence emerges through recursive viability selection.
formal_statement.persistence_statement: Existence persists by preserving recoverable future participation under recursive constraint.

full_stack.compressed_chain: difference -> interaction -> recurrence -> continuity -> transport -> traversability -> future reachability -> participation -> viability -> recursive temporality
full_stack.interpretation: Recursive existence emerges through stabilization of participatory continuity across increasingly structured viability layers.

core_kernel.existential_kernel: Existence persists where participation remains recursively traversable through coherent continuity propagation.
core_kernel.viability_kernel: Persistent existence preserves recoverable future participation under recursive constraint.
core_kernel.temporal_kernel: Recursive temporality emerges where coherent continuity propagation remains mutually traversable.

layer_definitions.difference: Difference creates distinguishability sufficient for interaction.
layer_definitions.interaction: Interaction couples differences into relational structure.
layer_definitions.continuity: Continuity preserves recurrent relational coherence across transformation.
layer_definitions.transport: Transport propagates continuity through accessibility structure.
layer_definitions.traversability: Traversability determines whether propagated continuity can be coherently crossed or re-entered.
layer_definitions.future_reachability: Future reachability describes recoverable future-fiber accessibility structure.
layer_definitions.participation: Participation is active traversable continuity within recoverable future structure.
layer_definitions.viability: Viability filters participation by preserving recoverable future accessibility under recursive constraint.
layer_definitions.recursive_temporality: Recursive temporality emerges where coherent continuity propagation remains mutually traversable.

wave_topological_condition.interpretation: Participatory traversability depends jointly on recoverable future-fiber topology and coherent continuity-wave propagation.

admissibility_condition.interpretation: Recursive evolution remains viable only while transformations preserve sufficient recursive participation capacity.

recursive_temporality_condition.interpretation: Recursive time emerges from mutually traversable coherent participatory continuity.

collapse_geometry.interpretation: Collapse corresponds to exhaustion of recoverable future participation under recursive constraint.
collapse_geometry.deep_form: Existence destabilizes when participation is no longer recursively traversable.

recovery_geometry.interpretation: Recovery restores recursively stabilized participation through reopening and recoherence of recoverable future-fiber continuity.

compression_laws: Existence emerges through recursive viability selection.
Existence persists where participation remains recursively traversable through coherent continuity propagation.
Topological accessibility does not guarantee dynamical traversability.
Viability requires recoverable future participation under recursive constraint.
Recursive temporality emerges through mutually traversable coherent continuity propagation.
Collapse is exhaustion of recoverable future participation.
Recovery reopens and recoheres participatory continuity.
one_sentence_lock: Existence persists where participation remains recursively traversable through coherent continuity propagation.
